cli_command.family_disambiguator: claude (TTY-passthrough Popen; positional prompt for episode 2+)

system_prompt_delivery_mode.notes: Claude platform-managed system-priority delivery. Episode-2+ runbook attached via second --append-system-prompt-file.

mcp_registration_file_path.notes: Worktree-local .mcp.json composed by shared launcher from main .mcp.json + active pipeline mcp_servers. Falls back to ${MAIN_ROOT}/.mcp.json when no pipeline contributes MCP servers.

agent_registry_mode.notes: Claude Code auto-discovers agents via 3s scan at startup. Pruned subtree per pipeline manifest.

token_measurement_mechanism.parse_strategy: tail-poll the active session's JSONL; sum input+output token counters per turn entry

auth_lifecycle.notes: OAuth managed by Claude Code itself; launcher takes no action.
